scenarios.title: Microsoft Source-Qualified Simple Read

gherkin.given:
CompanyIndex/v1 maps MSFT to sec-cik-0000789019 and its current pointer selects a hash-valid publication
And that publication contains sourced software KPIs, an accepted scenario revision, and separately dated market evidence
gherkin.when: the browser GETs the index, pointer, manifest, and referenced summary objects and renders Simple
gherkin.then:
the accepted state prioritizes cloud, backlog, capex, depreciation, margin, cash-conversion, and dilution records that exist
And the statement, model, brief, and market cutoffs equal the owner objects and the MSFT specialist cutoff remains separate

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-001 Microsoft Simple prioritizes sourced software drivers and preserves separate clocks

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-001 Microsoft Simple prioritizes sourced software drivers and preserves separate clocks

expectedAssertions: software priorities render only from sourced records
statement model brief market and specialist cutoffs remain distinct

scenarios.title: Chipotle Lease Context

gherkin.given: the source-qualified CMG publication contains funded-debt, lease-liability, equity, treasury-stock, and share observations
gherkin.when: selectResilienceView evaluates the cash/debt and liabilities/equity checks
gherkin.then:
the raw formulas use the reported observations without adjustment
And the contextual records name lease and treasury-stock effects with exact refs and no pass/fail value

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-002 Chipotle preserves raw leverage beside lease and treasury context

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-002 Chipotle preserves raw leverage beside lease and treasury context

expectedAssertions: raw accounting formulas remain unchanged
lease and treasury context has exact refs and no unconditional verdict

scenarios.title: JPMorgan Bank Applicability

gherkin.given: the accepted JPM archetype is financial-institution with deposits, credit, liquidity, CET1, and preferred-capital facts
gherkin.when: the resilience selector resolves diagnostic applicability
gherkin.then:
ordinary liabilities/equity and net-debt/EBITDA checks are inapplicable with the financial-institution policy ID
And bank-specific facts remain available without producing an industrial weakness rank

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-003 JPMorgan uses bank capital credit and liquidity rules without an industrial score

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-003 JPMorgan uses bank capital credit and liquidity rules without an industrial score

expectedAssertions: industrial diagnostics are inapplicable or qualified
bank credit liquidity capital facts remain available without an industrial rank

scenarios.title: Period-Safe History

gherkin.given: one company dossier contains compatible and incompatible ReportingPeriod/v1 records
gherkin.when: the user selects annual, quarterly, trailing, and comparison controls
gherkin.then:
each computed delta uses only matching duration, concept, unit, currency, and comparability states
And a YTD or instant observation never appears as a standalone quarter

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-004 annual quarterly YTD and instant history preserve exact period meaning

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-004 annual quarterly YTD and instant history preserve exact period meaning

expectedAssertions: only compatible period-aware deltas are enabled
YTD and instant observations never render as standalone quarters

scenarios.title: Statement Imbalance

gherkin.given: a copied accepted SEC fact set is changed so assets fall outside the summed XBRL rounding intervals for liabilities and equity
gherkin.when: the production publication validator runs statement integrity and dependent projections
gherkin.then:
it emits C010-INTEGRITY-BALANCE-SHEET with input refs, difference, and allowed interval
And clean resilience plus dependent model and brief outputs are blocked while source facts remain inspectable

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-005 statement imbalance blocks clean dependent conclusions and preserves source facts

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-005 statement imbalance blocks clean dependent conclusions and preserves source facts

expectedAssertions: difference and precision-derived interval are visible
dependent clean conclusions are blocked while source facts stay inspectable

scenarios.title: Restatement Lineage

gherkin.given: two eligible observations share company, concept, period, and unit and the later accession proves an amendment relation
gherkin.when: reconcileFactObservations builds the normalized fact
gherkin.then:
resolutionState is restated and currentObservationId names the amended observation
And both observation IDs remain in lineage and the change pipeline classifies the event as restatement

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-006 amended facts become current while original observations remain auditable

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-006 amended facts become current while original observations remain auditable

expectedAssertions: amended observation is current with filing identity
original observation and restatement disposition remain auditable

scenarios.title: Currency And Fiscal Incompatibility

gherkin.given: two company or peer facts differ in currency or non-aligned period and no explicit conversion/alignment object exists
gherkin.when: the comparison selector evaluates compatibility
gherkin.then:
the original values and bases remain visible
And growth, aggregate statistic, and rank are unavailable with the exact incompatibility reason

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-007 mixed currency and fiscal periods remain visible and unavailable for forced comparison

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-007 mixed currency and fiscal periods remain visible and unavailable for forced comparison

expectedAssertions: original currency and fiscal bases remain visible
unsupported growth statistic and rank remain unavailable with exact reason

scenarios.title: Archetype Priority Without Fact Mutation

gherkin.given: MSFT and CMG publications use the same normalized revenue and cash-flow contracts but different accepted archetypes
gherkin.when: selectSimpleView runs for each accepted state
gherkin.then:
MSFT prioritizes software drivers and CMG prioritizes unit/lease drivers
And the shared fact IDs, values, periods, units, and sources remain byte-equivalent to their dossier records

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-008 archetypes change KPI priority without changing shared financial facts

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-008 archetypes change KPI priority without changing shared financial facts

expectedAssertions: company-specific priority differs by accepted archetype
shared fact identity value period unit and source remain unchanged

scenarios.title: Unclassified Company

gherkin.given: a verified company publication has shared statements but ArchetypeAssignment/v1 status unclassified
gherkin.when: Simple and Detailed selectors run
gherkin.then:
shared statements and source trace remain available
And KPI priorities, archetype diagnostics, model definition, and company-specific brief claims are unavailable with evidence requirements

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-009 unclassified companies retain shared facts and inherit no default lens

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-009 unclassified companies retain shared facts and inherit no default lens

expectedAssertions: shared statements and trace remain usable
overlay-only outputs name evidence requirements and inherit no lens

scenarios.title: Raw And Contextual Diagnostic Trace

gherkin.given: a DiagnosticCheck/v1 has valid raw inputs and one evidenced contextual adjustment
gherkin.when: the Resilience workspace selects that check
gherkin.then:
raw value, formula, threshold, input refs, and period render before contextual output
And adjustment amount, rationale, source refs, sensitivity, and applicability render without erasing the raw record

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-010 raw and contextual diagnostics remain side by side with complete trace

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-010 raw and contextual diagnostics remain side by side with complete trace

expectedAssertions: raw precedes contextual with complete formula and refs
adjustment rationale sensitivity and applicability remain visible without score

scenarios.title: Preferred Stock Absence

gherkin.given: no eligible observation proves preferred stock present or explicit zero
gherkin.when: the preferred-stock diagnostic runs
gherkin.then:
its state is absent-from-eligible-source or unavailable
And no numeric zero, positive interpretation, or summary pass is emitted

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-011 omitted preferred stock is absent from source and never zero or pass

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-011 omitted preferred stock is absent from source and never zero or pass

expectedAssertions: state is absent-from-eligible-source or unavailable
no zero positive interpretation or summary pass appears

scenarios.title: Buyback And Dilution

gherkin.given: a publication contains gross repurchases, treasury stock, issuance, SBC, diluted shares, debt change, and available price context
gherkin.when: the capital-allocation metric and brief interpretation run
gherkin.then:
gross repurchase and treasury balance remain distinct from period flows
And any interpretation cites net share change and dilution rather than treating repurchase existence as beneficial

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-012 buyback interpretation includes issuance dilution and net share change

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-012 buyback interpretation includes issuance dilution and net share change

expectedAssertions: gross repurchases treasury balance and period flows remain distinct
interpretation cites issuance dilution and net share change

scenarios.title: Evidence Refresh Preserves User Assumptions

gherkin.given: local scenario revision U3 is active for the same company and model definition
gherkin.when: a newer hash-valid company publication is accepted
gherkin.then:
U3 values and revision identity remain active without rebasing
And affected drivers receive separate ModelImpactProposal/v1 records requiring a user decision

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-013 evidence refresh preserves accepted user assumptions and creates pending proposals only

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-013 evidence refresh preserves accepted user assumptions and creates pending proposals only

expectedAssertions: accepted revision values and identity remain unchanged
affected drivers receive separate pending proposals

scenarios.title: Linked Scenario Recompute

gherkin.given: an accepted scenario and acyclic model definition produce valid linked outputs
gherkin.when: editAssumption changes one company-specific driver and creates a draft
gherkin.then:
every reachable statement, cash, balance, KPI, per-share, and valuation node recomputes from the draft tuple
And unreachable history is unchanged and any failed node reports its dependency path

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-014 one driver edit recomputes linked outputs and exposes every invalid dependency

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-014 one driver edit recomputes linked outputs and exposes every invalid dependency

expectedAssertions: all dependency-reachable outputs recompute from one draft tuple
history remains unchanged and failed nodes expose dependency paths

scenarios.title: Simple Detailed Parity

gherkin.given: one CompanyAcceptedState/v1 has a fixed publication, scenario, brief, coverage, and market observation
gherkin.when: the user switches Simple to Detailed and across all six tabs
gherkin.then:
no company publication request is initiated by the mode/tab actions
And every shared value, classification, cutoff, conflict, proposal, and limitation matches the Simple selector

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-015 Simple Detailed and six tabs share one state without refetch or reinterpretation

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-015 Simple Detailed and six tabs share one state without refetch or reinterpretation

expectedAssertions: mode and tab changes issue zero publication requests
all shared values classes cutoffs conflicts proposals and limitations match

scenarios.title: Estimate To Actual

gherkin.given: an estimate observation exists for a period and a later eligible filing supplies a comparable reported observation
gherkin.when: the publication reconciles the period
gherkin.then:
estimate and reported observations retain separate classes, sources, and clocks
And forecast error is derived only when definition, unit, currency, and period are compatible

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-016 sourced actuals preserve prior estimates classes clocks and comparable forecast error

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-016 sourced actuals preserve prior estimates classes clocks and comparable forecast error

expectedAssertions: estimate and actual retain separate classes sources and clocks
forecast error appears only for compatible definitions units currencies and periods

scenarios.title: Material Filing Update

gherkin.given: prior and current publications differ on a sourced fact linked to an active claim and sensitive model driver
gherkin.when: the evidence-change and brief pipelines run
gherkin.then:
the change is material with source, period, mechanism, claim effect, and model-impact proposal when numeric support exists
And unchanged claims are not emitted as new changes

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-017 a material filing change leads the brief and links thesis and model effects

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-017 a material filing change leads the brief and links thesis and model effects

expectedAssertions: material change leads with source period mechanism and claim effect
numeric proposal appears only with support and unchanged claims are not new

scenarios.title: Management Claim Boundary

gherkin.given: a rights-valid issuer evidence manifest records a management assertion without reported delivery evidence
gherkin.when: the brief pipeline evaluates it
gherkin.then:
the observation class remains management-claim with its window and source
And it may create a watch condition or proposal but cannot create a reported fact or actual

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-018 management language remains a claim and never becomes a reported actual

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-018 management language remains a claim and never becomes a reported actual

expectedAssertions: management assertion retains class source and window
it can create watch or proposal but never a reported actual

scenarios.title: Rumor Boundary

gherkin.given: a news observation has no authoritative confirmation and may affect event risk
gherkin.when: the brief and scenario reducers process it
gherkin.then:
the item remains news with unverified limitation and evidence needed
And the accepted facts, assumptions, and scenario revision are byte-equivalent to their pre-evaluation state

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-019 unverified news cannot change facts assumptions or scenario revision

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-019 unverified news cannot change facts assumptions or scenario revision

expectedAssertions: item remains News with unverified limitation and evidence need
accepted facts assumptions and revision fingerprints remain unchanged

scenarios.title: Sentiment Divergence

gherkin.given: a current sentiment observation is positive and a separately sourced reported trend is deteriorating
gherkin.when: selectBriefView renders the current thesis
gherkin.then:
both evidence classes, windows, sources, and divergent directions are present
And confidence is constrained without changing the reported fundamental direction

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-020 sentiment divergence preserves both clocks and fundamental direction

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-020 sentiment divergence preserves both clocks and fundamental direction

expectedAssertions: both evidence classes windows sources and directions remain visible
confidence is constrained without changing fundamental direction

scenarios.title: Company-Specific Macro Mechanism

gherkin.given: a macro observation changes and an accepted company mechanism links it to financing, demand, valuation, or operating economics
gherkin.when: the change ranker evaluates relevance
gherkin.then:
the brief cites that mechanism and affected driver or risk
And the same macro observation is context-only or excluded for a company with no evidenced mechanism

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-021 macro context enters only through an evidenced company mechanism

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-021 macro context enters only through an evidenced company mechanism

expectedAssertions: linked company cites mechanism and affected driver or risk
unlinked company keeps the same macro item context-only or excluded

scenarios.title: Materiality Beats Headline Count

gherkin.given: one new high-quality KPI change affects a sensitive driver and several duplicate generic news observations do not
gherkin.when: rankEvidenceChanges applies the versioned ranking policy
gherkin.then:
the KPI change ranks first with its component scores
And duplicate headline count contributes no independent source-quality or materiality weight

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-022 one sensitive KPI outranks repeated generic headlines without volume weighting

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-022 one sensitive KPI outranks repeated generic headlines without volume weighting

expectedAssertions: KPI change ranks first with visible component scores
duplicate headline count adds no independent weight

scenarios.title: Proposal Acceptance

gherkin.given: active scenario revision R4 and a validated pending proposal target one assumption
gherkin.when: the proposal arrives or the user opens it
gherkin.then:
R4 remains active and unchanged
When the user accepts or edits and confirms the proposal
Then a new immutable revision R5 is created and rejection instead records a decision with no revision change

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-023 proposal arrival is inert and confirmation alone creates a new scenario revision

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-023 proposal arrival is inert and confirmation alone creates a new scenario revision

expectedAssertions: arrival/open leaves R4 byte-equivalent
accept or edit-confirm creates one child revision while reject creates none

scenarios.title: Stale Evidence

gherkin.given: the latest valid KPI observation exceeds its explicit class freshness policy
gherkin.when: the brief and Simple selectors run
gherkin.then:
the KPI state is stale with its original cutoff and required update
And unsupported current claims and model-impact proposals are absent while prior dated truth remains visible

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-024 stale evidence retains its cutoff and withholds unsupported current claims

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-024 stale evidence retains its cutoff and withholds unsupported current claims

expectedAssertions: stale class retains original cutoff and names required update
unsupported claims and proposals are absent while prior truth remains

scenarios.title: Source Conflict

gherkin.given: two eligible observations appear to map to one company concept and period but materially disagree without amendment relation
gherkin.when: reconciliation and dependent projections run
gherkin.then:
both observations remain visible and the normalized fact state is conflicted
And no average is created and dependent metrics, anchors, and claims inherit conflicted or unavailable state

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-025 conflicting sources remain visible and never become an average

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-025 conflicting sources remain visible and never become an average

expectedAssertions: all conflicting values and mappings remain visible
no average/current clean anchor is created and dependent states propagate

scenarios.title: Missing Field Propagation

gherkin.given: an accepted dossier lacks one required fact observation while independent facts are valid
gherkin.when: derived metrics and model nodes evaluate
gherkin.then:
the concept remains unavailable and no zero or carried value is created
And only dependency-reachable outputs are withheld with the missing fact ID

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-026 missing concepts remain unavailable while independent facts stay usable

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-026 missing concepts remain unavailable while independent facts stay usable

expectedAssertions: missing concept is unavailable with no zero or carry
only dependency-reachable outputs are withheld and name the fact ID

scenarios.title: Optional Provider Failure

gherkin.given: a current hash-valid SEC/issuer publication is accepted
gherkin.when: an eligible optional enrichment request fails validation or transport
gherkin.then:
the accepted dossier, scenario, and prior brief remain rendered
And only that evidence class reports unavailable and no credential field or synthetic value appears

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-027 optional source failure preserves the last valid dossier without credential prompts

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-027 optional source failure preserves the last valid dossier without credential prompts

expectedAssertions: dossier scenario and prior brief remain rendered
only failed class is unavailable and no credential or synthetic value appears

scenarios.title: Peer Compatibility

gherkin.given: a PeerSet/v1 contains comparable, qualified, and excluded observations with explicit purposes
gherkin.when: selectPeersView computes level or trend context
gherkin.then:
only comparable observations enter the named statistic and sample size
And qualified/excluded rows, missing counts, outliers, and exact reasons remain visible with no zero insertion

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-028 incompatible peers stay outside statistics and ranks with exact reasons

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-028 incompatible peers stay outside statistics and ranks with exact reasons

expectedAssertions: only comparable rows enter named statistics and sample size
qualified excluded missing outlier and reason truth remains visible without zero

scenarios.title: Claim Traceability

gherkin.given: a Simple direction, resilience, change, catalyst, or risk claim is rendered with data-ref
gherkin.when: the user activates its trace control
gherkin.then:
Sources focuses the exact observation, artifact, period/window, mapping, formula or interpretation, and consumers
And restatements, conflicts, rights limits, and unavailable links remain in the chain

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-029 every material claim reaches its exact source transformation and consumer chain

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-029 every material claim reaches its exact source transformation and consumer chain

expectedAssertions: trace focuses exact observation artifact period mapping formula or interpretation and consumers
restatements conflicts rights and unavailable links remain visible with focus return

scenarios.title: Feature 002 Boundary

gherkin.given: the frozen registry selects company-fundamentals-owner-v1 and its committed owner-read manifest
gherkin.when: Feature 002 builds ToolModelRead/v1 and the final Market Brief consumes it
gherkin.then:
statement, model, company-brief, and market cutoffs equal the owner records and limitations remain intact
And no Feature 002 function recomputes facts, changes archetype, applies proposals, or promotes price movement to fresh fundamentals

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-030 Feature 002 preserves owner clocks limitations and non recomputation boundary

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-030 Feature 002 preserves owner clocks limitations and non recomputation boundary

expectedAssertions: statement model brief and market clocks plus limitations equal owner records
Feature 002 does not recompute facts apply proposals change archetype or freshen fundamentals

scenarios.title: Unchanged Brief

gherkin.given: a prior validated brief exists and every new eligible observation is duplicate, confirmation, or immaterial to active claims/drivers
gherkin.when: the evidence-change and brief pipelines run
gherkin.then:
brief status is unchanged and reviewed evidence plus no-change rationale are recorded
And no material-change item, model proposal, or duplicate narrative content is created

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-031 immaterial reviewed evidence produces one unchanged brief without narrative churn

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-031 immaterial reviewed evidence produces one unchanged brief without narrative churn

expectedAssertions: unchanged status records reviewed evidence and no-change rationale
no material change proposal duplicate narrative or duplicate history appears

scenarios.title: Accessible Narrow Workspace

gherkin.given: the real page loads a source-qualified company publication in system Chrome at 320 CSS pixels
gherkin.when: the user selects a company, switches modes/tabs, edits a draft, reviews a proposal, and traces a claim using the keyboard
gherkin.then:
focus order, names, roles, selected states, error descriptions, live summaries, and focus return are correct
And chart-equivalent tables expose the same values and the document body has no horizontal overflow or color-only state

linkedTests: tests/company-fundamentals-lab.spec.mjs :: Regression: SCN-010-032 keyboard research flow is accessible at 320 pixels without body overflow

linkedTestContracts.testId: Regression: SCN-010-032 keyboard research flow is accessible at 320 pixels without body overflow

expectedAssertions: keyboard flow has correct focus names roles selected states errors live summaries and return
chart tables match values and body has no overflow or color-only state
